title: SnoozeHelper exported receiver sendBroadcast
notes: REJECTED: 'SnoozeHelper.EVALUATE' is a protected broadcast on Android 16 (isProtectedBroadcast=true). Non-system processes (including shell uid=2000) cannot send this broadcast. SecurityException thrown: 'not allowed to send broadcast SnoozeHelper.EVALUATE'. Receiver IS registered with RECEIVER_EXPORTED and no permission protection, but the broadcast sending side is blocked.
